basic_details.job_title: Sports Authority of India Assistant Coach Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Offline for 100 Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Sports Authority of India (SAI), under the Ministry of Youth Affairs & Sports, Government of India, has released an official advertisement for Assistant Coach positions.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: Not exceeding 56 years as on the opening date of receipt of application. | Place of Posting: All-India basis at centres where SAI schemes are being implemented.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the minimum qualifications and parameters specified by SAI: | Option A: Officers working under Central Government/State Governments/Union Territory Administrations holding an analogous post in their parent cadre/department. Option B: Officers with at least 6 years of regular service in Level-5, Rs. 25,500–81,100 (Pay Band-1, Rs. 5200–20200 + Rs. 2800/- Grade Pay). | Option A: Diploma in Coaching from SAI NS NIS, Patiala or equivalent (as defined by SAI) or from any other recognised Indian/Foreign University/Institute. Option B: Participation in Olympics/Paralympics/Asian Games/World Championship or equivalent (as defined by SAI) with a certificate course in Coaching. Option C: Dronacharya Awardee. Option D: As defined by the governing body of SAI in respect of sports quota recruits.

salary_details.pay scale: Pay Matrix Level-06: ₹35,400–₹1,12,400/- (Pay Band-2, Rs. 9300-34800 + Rs. 4200/- Grade Pay)
salary_details.details: Essential administrative details regarding the vacancy package include:

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must submit their applications through proper channel (Cadre Controlling Authority):
Download the prescribed application format (Annexure-I / CV Proforma) from the official SAI website: www.sportsauthorityofindia.nic.in.
Fill out the application completely and attach attested copies of certificates for age, qualifications, and experience.
Enclose the last 5 years' ACRs/APARs duly attested on each page by an officer of Under Secretary rank or above.
Also enclose: Integrity Certificate, Vigilance Clearance, No Penalty Certificate (last 5 years), verification certificate, and Cadre Clearance Certificate.
Submit the application (in duplicate) through proper channel/Cadre Controlling Authority on or before 27.06.2026 by 5:00 PM to:
O/o the Dy. Director (Human Resources Division-II), Sports Authority of India, Head Office, Gate No. 10 (East Gate), Jawaharlal Nehru Stadium, Lodhi Road, New Delhi – 110003

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SAI Assistant Coach Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application through proper channel is June 27, 2026, by 5:00 PM.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in SAI Assistant Coach Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 100 Assistant Coach posts have been announced by the Sports Authority of India.

faq.question: Q3. What is the recruitment method for SAI Assistant Coach posts?
faq.answer: The recruitment will be done on a deputation basis, including short-term contract.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary of an Assistant Coach in SAI?
faq.answer: The pay scale is Level-06 (₹35,400 – ₹1,12,400) under Pay Matrix (Pay Band-2 with Grade Pay ₹4200).

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for SAI Assistant Coach Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be not exceeding 56 years as on the application opening date.

faq.question: Q6. What qualifications are required for SAI Assistant Coach posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have either: Diploma in Coaching from SAI NS NIS or equivalent, or Participation in international events (Olympics/Asian Games etc.) with coaching certification, or Be a Dronacharya Awardee, or Meet SAI sports quota norms

faq.question: Q7. Who is eligible to apply for SAI Assistant Coach Recruitment?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates include Central/State Government/UT officers holding analogous posts or with 6 years of service in Level-5 pay scale.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the selected candidates be posted?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be posted across India at SAI centres.
